module.name: shell
module.purpose: Native shell command execution tool program. shell_execute.rs defines ShellExecute, a unit-struct tool that carries NAME/DESCRIPTION/INPUT_SCHEMA/OUTPUT_SCHEMA constants and implements ToolProgram; preview() builds a ToolPreview whose ToolSchema wraps schema strings in ToolInputSchema { content } and ToolOutputSchema { content }, and invoke() parses the JSON call via marix_common::external::serde_json, runs {command, cwd?} through the current operating system shell, and returns {exit_code, stdout, stderr} JSON or a {"error":..} JSON on failure. timeout_ms is accepted in the input schema but not currently enforced. mod.rs is re-export wiring only.
